response.overview: Struggling in a traditional monogamous relationship, my partner gave me a book about Polyamory. I read it and then wanted to meet real people living polyamorous lives to understand it more. This film is my journey to understand what polyamory, open-relationships and unicorns are all about.
response.tagline: Candid interviews reveal the promises and pitfalls of polyamorous relationships.
response.title: Limit(less) Sex and Love
